item.title: TopoGuard：基于图论防御RAG上的分块知识攻击
item.summary: arXiv:2607.20437v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Production Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems rely on aggregating multiple external documents to answer complex queries. However, the retrieved documents introduce a new threat surface that can be exploited to launch split-knowledge attacks. In this attack, the
